name: Jam Master Jay
description:
'''Jason William Mizell''' (January 21, 1965 – October 30, 2002), better known by his stage name '''Jam Master Jay''', was an American musician, record producer and DJ. He was the DJ of the influential [[Hip-hop|hip hop]] group [[Run-DMC]]. During the 1980s, Run-DMC became one of the biggest hip hop groups, credited with breaking hip hop into mainstream music. Mizell was inducted posthumously into the [[Rock and Roll Hall of Fame]] as a member of Run-DMC in 2009.

Mizell was murdered in his [[Queens]] recording studio in 2002 and his case was left unsolved until February 2024, when Ronald Washington and his godson Karl Jordan Jr., were convicted for the 2002 drug-related murder, with a third man, Jay Bryant, pleading guilty in 2026 to participating in the murder.
